heading: Rule of construction relating to the Commodities Exchange Act
label: 80b–18c Rule of construction relating to the Commodities Exchange Act
text: Nothing in this subchapter shall relieve any person of any obligation or duty, or affect the availability of any right or remedy available to the Commodity Futures Trading Commission or any private party, arising under the Commodity Exchange Act ( et seq.) governing commodity pools, commodity pool operators, or commodity trading advisors.7 U.S.C. 1
notes: References in TextThe Commodity Exchange Act, referred to in text, is , , which is classified generally to chapter 1 (§ 1 et seq.) of Title 7, Agriculture. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see and Tables.act Sept. 21, 1922, ch. 36942 Stat. 998section 1 of Title 7

Effective DateSection effective 1 year after , except that any investment adviser may, at the discretion of the investment adviser, register with the Commission under the Investment Advisers Act of 1940 during that 1-year period, subject to the rules of the Commission, and except as otherwise provided, see , set out as an Effective Date of 2010 Amendment note under .July 21, 2010section 419 of Pub. L. 111–203section 80b–2 of this title
